detail.description: Lenyn Sosa singles on a soft ground ball to second baseman Luke Keaschall. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. scores. Kazuma Okamoto to 2nd.
Lenyn Sosa homers (1) on a fly ball to left center field.
Lenyn Sosa singles on a sharp ground ball to right fielder Austin Martin.
Lenyn Sosa doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to left fielder James Outman.
Lenyn Sosa singles on a line drive to left fielder James Outman. Daulton Varsho to 2nd.
Lenyn Sosa singles on a line drive to left fielder Isaac Collins. Munetaka Murakami to 2nd.
Lenyn Sosa singles on a line drive to center fielder Kyle Isbel.
Lenyn Sosa doubles (3) on a ground ball to left fielder Michael Massey.
Lenyn Sosa doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Isaac Collins.
Lenyn Sosa hits a ground-rule double (4) on a fly ball to left-center field.
Lenyn Sosa singles on a line drive to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.
Lenyn Sosa singles on a fly ball to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.
Lenyn Sosa singles on a fly ball to center fielder Colton Cowser. Chase Meidroth scores.
Lenyn Sosa doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Nathan Lukes. Munetaka Murakami scores.
Lenyn Sosa singles on a ground ball to center fielder Daulton Varsho.
Lenyn Sosa singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Jo Adell.
Lenyn Sosa doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jo Adell. Ernie Clement scores. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. scores.

Lenyn Sosa singles on a ground ball to center fielder Angel Martínez.
Lenyn Sosa doubles (7) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Riley Greene. Daulton Varsho to 3rd.

Lenyn Sosa singles on a ground ball to right fielder Aaron Judge.
